overall.description: First-person perspective inside an elevator ascending through a cyberpunk megastructure at night. The clip shows digital advertisement screens inside the elevator transitioning to views of the dystopian vertical cityscape with industrial architecture and neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevator interior with digital advertising displays

events.description: advertisement screens change content from SPEEDY to ALL FOODS branding
elevator begins ascending as indicated by floor panel display changing from 01 ENTRANCE to upper floors

agents.ego_description: standing in the elevator watching the advertisement screens cycle through various product advertisements

entered.detail: four digital screens arranged in a 2x2 grid displaying animated advertisements
metal control panel with illuminated floor indicator and call buttons
horizontal metal handrail mounted on the left interior wall
horizontal metal handrail mounted on the right interior wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens inside a dimly lit elevator with four digital screens displaying advertisements for SPEEDY and ALL FOODS. The elevator control panel shows the floor indicator beginning to change as the lift starts its ascent. The environment is enclosed with metal walls and handrails, illuminated by the glow of the screens.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevator transitioning to exterior shaft view

events.description: camera pans from interior advertisement screens to side window revealing exterior elevator shaft
exterior neon lighting becomes visible through the window grille as the elevator ascends

agents.ego_description: turning to look out the elevator window as the lift begins its ascent through the building structure

entered.detail: metal barred security window revealing the elevator shaft exterior
concrete and metal elevator shaft wall with industrial texture

segments.scene_description: The camera pans right from the advertisement screens toward the elevator window as the lift accelerates upward. The interior lighting mixes with the neon glow from outside as the window grille comes into view, revealing the industrial elevator shaft and the beginning of the ascent through the megastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: ascending elevator shaft with view of megastructure interior

events.description: industrial walkways and building levels become visible outside the window as the elevator climbs
passing the medical studios level with illuminated signage visible on the building facade

agents.ego_description: riding the elevator upward while observing the industrial megastructure and building levels passing by outside

entered.detail: metal walkways and platforms attached to the building exterior
illuminated signage reading MEDICAL STUDIOS on the building wall
multiple floors and architectural details of the vertical megastructure

segments.scene_description: The elevator continues its ascent through the massive industrial structure, passing by metal walkways and building levels visible through the window. The MEDICAL STUDIOS sign comes into view on the left as the elevator climbs higher, with the window grille now dominating the foreground and the cityscape visible beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper megastructure levels with dense neon signage

events.description: increased density of neon signs and upper level building details become visible at higher altitude

agents.ego_description: continuing to ascend through the upper levels of the cyberpunk city structure with vibrant neon lights illuminating the exterior

entered.detail: colorful illuminated advertisements and neon signs on building walls
detailed architecture and structural elements of upper megastructure levels

segments.scene_description: The elevator reaches the upper levels of the megastructure, where dense neon signage and illuminated billboards light up the exterior. The view shows the complex vertical architecture of the cyberpunk city, with the elevator continuing its steady climb past building facades and glowing advertisements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the enclosed interior of a dimly lit elevator into a sprawling, neon-drenched cyberpunk cityscape. It begins within the metal walls of the lift, where the glow of digital advertisements for SPEEDY and ALL FOODS illuminates the space as the floor indicator begins to climb. As the lift accelerates, the camera pans right toward the window, shifting the focus from the interior screens to the industrial elevator shaft and the emerging lights of the megastructure. The scene then expands as the elevator ascends past metal walkways and a MEDICAL STUDIOS sign, with the window grille framing a growing view of the vertical architecture. Finally, the climb reaches the upper levels, where the environment transforms into a dense array of illuminated billboards and glowing facades that light up the night sky.
